|rBlackwater Warder joins the fight!|n
|rLamp Wisp joins the fight!|n
|rThe Hollow Lantern flares through the drowned lenswork and the old line answers. A warder rises from the blackwater while a lamp wisp feeds the light around it.|n
|rThe Hollow Lantern burns hotter and the whole lamp house starts answering in bad light.|n
The Hollow Lantern struggles against the frost and loses the moment.
